data.body: LEAF 3863 (immune-floury-toad) TDD complete + validated. Held-out impl subagent authored .rebar/criteria_routing.json + .rebar/prompts/plan-review-project-portability.md from intent+ACs only (never saw the test file). Restored oracle: all 11 assertions GREEN (activation, frontmatter, resolution, leaf+container routing, production fan-in via FakeRunner, and every rubric literal: 4 finding-threshold elements, 5 typed field markers, 4 client-shape label:values, both non-finding rules). Teeth check: block_threshold 0.9->0.8 reddens criterion_activation; corrupting the omission-guard literal reddens omission_guard only (not tautologies). Fixed my own test-hygiene bug (production_fan_in now copies committed files into a tmp repo, no REPO_ROOT leak). AMBIENT-OVERLAY blast radius (from a full suite run): activating the committed overlay legitimately changed effective_criteria(<real root>), breaking 3 pre-existing tests that pin BUILT-IN routing/tier — fixed by isolating them from project.* (threshold_recalibration._routing() excludes project.*; production_batch_runner tier-split pins repo_root to a no-overlay tmp). Verified: 5 unrelated full-suite failures are PRE-EXISTING/environmental (3 config_show/perf = this machine has ~/.config/rebar; 2 audit_ticket_page = 'No module named tests' invocation artifact) — confirmed identical on a stashed clean origin/main tree, NOT my regression. Also: added surgical .gitignore negations for criteria_routing.json + the prompt (siblings stay ignored). Running full make test (no xdist) to confirm CI-green before commit/push.
